name: scope-reduction
description: Use when pruning out-of-scope implementation work before expanding a

# Skill: Scope Reduction

## Goal
Prune non-essential implementation work before code expansion.

## Architecture Components
- workflow-orchestrator: Artifact-driven stage transitions with strict schema checks

## Constraints
- Reject out-of-scope work unless explicitly revised in Stage 2.
